case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ALEJANDRO FLORES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, ALEJANDRO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
